headline: Vertiv, Lumentum, Coherent, and EchoStar to Join S&P 500
summary: The changes highlight the growing weight of technology and communications infrastructure in the U.S. market.

headline: Vertiv Holdings, Lumentum Holdings, Coherent, and EchoStar Set to Join S&P 500; Others to Join S&P 100, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600

headline: Nvidia-Tied AI Stocks Vertiv, Lumentum, Coherent To Join S&P 500 Index
summary: AI stocks Vertiv, Lumentum and Coherent, all with strong Nvidia ties, will join the S&P 500 before the open on March 23, along with EchoStar.

raw.headline: Nvidia-Tied AI Stocks Vertiv, Lumentum, Coherent To Join S&P 500 Index
raw.summary: AI stocks Vertiv, Lumentum and Coherent, all with strong Nvidia ties, will join the S&P 500 before the open on March 23, along with EchoStar.

headline: Vertiv and EchoStar lead tech surge in S&P 500 rebalance
summary: Investing.com -- S&P Dow Jones Indices announced a sweeping overhaul of its benchmark tracking on Friday, propelling several technology and industrial firms into the prestigious S&P 500. Shares of Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE:VRT) surged 5.6% in after-hours trading following the news, while EchoStar Corporation (NASDAQ:SATS) and Lumentum Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:LITE) also saw significant gains. The quarterly reshuffle is designed to maintain the integrity of the market’s most-watched gauges. S&P DJI st
